title: RG-007 created: Stage 7 — Win/Lose States
message: NOFI approved Stage 7. State machine: 'playing' | 'win' | 'lose'. Slime.hp=0 → 'win' + 'YOU WIN'. Player.hp=0 → 'lose' + 'YOU DIED'. Both stop gameplay. HP clamped to 0. NO restart, NO R key, NO menu, NO new enemies.

description: Fun and visual upgrade plan (planning only, no code)

Stage 12 Better Visual Style complete. Floor checker, stone walls, carved pillars, blob slime, knight player, top+bottom HUD bars. Awaiting NOFI approval to begin Stage 13 (Combat Feedback / Juice).
Roguelike V1 freeze (state-change only, no code, no QA, NOFI directive to pause project and start something new)
Thor coordinates the freeze. No code, no QA. State change only.
Freeze begins. All shipped code preserved. Game server keeps running. status.md updated. State cleared for new project.
Freeze complete. RGV1 paused at Stage 12 (v0.2 in-progress). All 12 stage tags + v0.1 release tag preserved. Game server still serving 200. Awaiting NOFI new project brief.
Project setup + running app: Vite+React+Tailwind+Shadcn+Radix+Framer Motion frontend, FastAPI+SQLite backend, 5 navigable pages, no business logic
Forge implements. Argus verifies. Thor coordinates. NO hero mode.

Forge Stage 1 implementation report (work done in subagent that hit 600s timeout; Thor recovered on-disk artifacts and wrote the report).
stack: react-19 + vite-8 + ts-6 + tailwind-3 + shadcn + radix + framer-motion-12 + react-router-6 / fastapi + sqlalchemy-2 + sqlite + uvicorn + pillow
